---
title: Another day. Another night
author: "Barbara Kruger"
subtitle: "Guggenheim Bilbao"
format: html
image: https://aarhusinside.dk/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/Besoegende-ser-paa-stort-roedt-tekstvaerk-af-Barbara-Kruger-paa-ARoS.webp
image-alt: people viewing Barbara Kruger art
---


![](https://aarhusinside.dk/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/Besoegende-ser-paa-stort-roedt-tekstvaerk-af-Barbara-Kruger-paa-ARoS.webp)



<https://www.guggenheim-bilbao.eus/fr/expositions/barbara-kruger>
